case_title: FP 2001 COMPANY, LLC VS. DAVID ERJAVEC et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF FP 2001 COMPANY, LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FP 2001 COMPANY, LLC SERVED JUL-15-2003, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ERJAVEC, DAVID

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FP 2001 COMPANY, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ERJAVEC, DAVID THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1390 MARKET ST. #2720, S.F. CA., SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION RE DAILY RENTAL VALUE: $40.50 FILED BY PLAINTIFF FP 2001 COMPANY, LLC
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FP 2001 COMPANY, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT ERJAVEC, DAVID DOES 1 TO 5,INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT ERJAVEC, DAVID
DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - RENTAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FP 2001 COMPANY, LLC
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
